Part.Source:
Do case CAse &NfeSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada For Each ORder EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, NfeItmCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where NfeCod = &NfeCod where not NfeDtaFat.IsEmpty() and not NfeDtaFat.IsNull()
//ATUALIZA ESTOQUE FISCAL Do CAse CAse NfeLctAtuEstFis = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada //EMPRESA ENTRADA If NfeProGraCod > 1 AtualizaproducaoEntradaSaida.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, 3, NfeDtaFat, NfeProCod, 1, NfeProQtd, NfeProVlrUnt, NfeLctAtuEstFis, '+') EndIF AtualizaProducaoEntradaSaida.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, 3, NfeDtaFat, NfeProCod, NfeProGraCod, NfeProQtd, NfeProVlrUnt, NfeLctAtuEstFis, '+')
CAse NfeLctAtuEstFis = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida //EMPRESA SAIDA if NfeProGraCod > 1 AtualizaProducaoEntradaSaida.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, 3, NfeDtaFat, NfeProCod, 1, NfeProQtd, NfeProVlrUnt, NfeLctAtuEstFis, '-') EndIf AtualizaProducaoEntradaSaida.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, 3, NfeDtaFat, NfeProCod, NfeProGraCod, NfeProQtd, NfeProVlrUnt, NfeLctAtuEstFis, '-') EndCase EndFor
CAse &NfeSts = Status_NFe.Cancelada For Each ORder EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, NfeItmCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where NfeCod = &NfeCod
//ATUALIZA ESTOQUE FISCAL Do CAse CAse NfeLctAtuEstFis = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada //EMPRESA ENTRADA If NfeProGraCod > 1 AtualizaproducaoEntradaSaida.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, 3, NfeDtaFat, NfeProCod, 1, NfeProQtd, NfeProVlrUnt, NfeLctAtuEstFis, '-') EndIF AtualizaProducaoEntradaSaida.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, 3, NfeDtaFat, NfeProCod, NfeProGraCod, NfeProQtd, NfeProVlrUnt, NfeLctAtuEstFis, '-')
CAse NfeLctAtuEstFis = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida //EMPRESA SAIDA if NfeProGraCod > 1 AtualizaProducaoEntradaSaida.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, 3, NfeDtaFat, NfeProCod, 1, NfeProQtd, NfeProVlrUnt, NfeLctAtuEstFis, '+') EndIf AtualizaProducaoEntradaSaida.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, 3, NfeDtaFat, NfeProCod, NfeProGraCod, NfeProQtd, NfeProVlrUnt, NfeLctAtuEstFis, '+') EndCase EndFor
EndCase
